response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years across web, backend, and infrastructure work, including recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, which is a rare and explicitly required skill. Core stack alignment is strong on TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, test tooling authorship). Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Jest experience, limited React depth relative to Ember, and no Kotlin or Python listed.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js in recent production roles
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience; frontend history leans Ember over React
Kotlin and Python absent from skills despite multi-language requirement (Java present)
No named experience with Vitest, Jest, or Playwright specifically

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of fullstack TypeScript/Node experience
Missing Nest.js and named JS testing frameworks
